title: Revert to v44 — Remove all PDF integration and canister audit changes

requirements.text: Remove the 'Attach PDF' icon button from all Quotations Fund transaction rows in FundsManagement.tsx. This was the initial PDF UI change added in the first PDF integration step.

quotes: i need to revert to the last operating version before implementing changes to integrate pdf. nothing is working since we integrated the pdf

acceptanceCriteria: No 'Attach PDF' button or file input appears on any transaction row in FundsManagement.tsx
No hidden file input elements with accept='.pdf' remain in the component

requirements.text: Delete the `usePdfAttachments` custom React hook file (`frontend/src/hooks/usePdfAttachments.ts`) that wraps IndexedDB operations for storing, retrieving, and deleting PDF files keyed by transaction ID.

quotes: revert to the last operating version before implementing changes to integrate pdf

acceptanceCriteria: The file `frontend/src/hooks/usePdfAttachments.ts` no longer exists in the project
No imports of `usePdfAttachments` remain anywhere in the codebase

requirements.text: Remove all usePdfAttachments hook wiring from FundsManagement.tsx — specifically the savePdf call on file selection, the hasAttachment-based visual indicator (paperclip icon or green checkmark), the 'View' button that opens a PDF in a new tab, and the 'Download' button that triggers a browser file download. The transaction rows must be restored to their pre-PDF state with no PDF-related UI or logic.

quotes: nothing is working since we integrated the pdf

acceptanceCriteria: Transaction rows in FundsManagement.tsx show no PDF-related buttons (Attach, View, Download)
No paperclip icon or green checkmark attachment indicator appears on any transaction row
No calls to savePdf, getPdf, deletePdf, or hasAttachment exist in FundsManagement.tsx
The component compiles and renders without errors

requirements.text: Revert any canister ID audit changes made to `vite.config.ts`, `.env`, `.env.production`, and the fallback logic in the canister resolution layer (but NOT `frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts` which is immutable). Restore these files to the exact state they were in at v44 — the stable baseline before the canister audit work began in v45.

quotes: revert to the last operating version before implementing changes to integrate pdf

acceptanceCriteria: vite.config.ts canister ID injection logic matches the v44 state
Any .env or .env.production files modified during the canister audit are restored to their v44 state
No canister audit-specific overrides or patches remain outside of the immutable useActor.ts file

constraints: Do NOT modify frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts — it is an immutable path
Do NOT modify frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts — it is an immutable path
Do NOT modify frontend/src/main.tsx — it is an immutable path
Do NOT modify anything under frontend/src/components/ui — immutable path
No backend changes required — this revert is frontend-only
The result must exactly match the v44 stable baseline state
nonGoals: Adding any new features beyond the v44 baseline
Fixing or patching the canister connection error with new logic — only reverting the audit changes
